data.content: Implemented src/components/history-debug-panel.tsx as a standalone client panel with Expected/Actual Outcome fields, Debug submit flow, embedded xterm terminal wired to terminal SSE, and prompt-builder extensibility for later integration. Added unit coverage in src/components/__tests__/history-debug-panel.test.ts and verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build on branch work/foolery-742c-impl (commit 9d3bbd1b43ac).
